metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_542
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.1
MAGI2 is localized at inhibitory synapses.
Literal
"We found that 32.1 ± 5.4% of S-SCAM clusters were apposed to VGAT clusters, whereas 69.8 ± 5.8% of VGAT clusters were apposed to S-SCAM clusters. We also immunostained cells with anti-gephyrin antibody (Fig. 1b, lower panel). We found that 35.4 ± 7.4% of S-SCAM clusters were co-localized with gephyrin clusters, whereas 62.7 ± 10.9% of gephyrin clusters were co-localized with S-SCAM clusters. These findings suggest that almost one-third of signals detected by anti-S-SCAM antibody arelocalized at inhibitory synapses."
Fig. 8e
MAGI2 colocalized with neuroligin 2 at inhibitory synapses.
Literal
"In the immunofluorescence of rat primary cultured hippocampal neurons, neuroligin 2 was partially overlapped with S-SCAM and b-DG"

24/5/2017 Pim
- Fig.1 shows that MAGI2 is localized at inh. synapses.
- Fig.8a shows direct interaction of the cytosolic MAGI2 protein with transmembrane neurologin 2.
- Fig.8e shows colocalization of MAGI2 and neuroligin 2 in inhibitory synapses.
Neuroligin is a known postsynapic protein of inhibitory synapses that interacts with presynaptic neurexin proteins.
In conclusion, via PPI and colocalization with neuroligin 2 a postsynaptic localization of MAGI2 is evidenced. Since MAGI2 interacts with the TM neuroligin protein the membrane association type is "extrinsic component....". Experimental description: Experiment of immunohistochemistry are made in rat.
Literal from M&M
"Hippocampal neuron cultures were obtained from rat embryonic day-18 (E18) embryos as described previously (Goslin and Banker 1991)".

Fig.8: "Co-localization of S-SCAM, β-DG and neuroligin 2 at inhibitory synapses. Rat primary cultured hippocampal neurons were immunostained with rabbit anti-S-SCAM (14-64), ...." (rat neurons, endogenous protein is investigated)
